falsification_conditions.condition: The S&P 500 closes above 5,200 (a key resistance level identified in the bottom_2024_aug pattern) by 3% within 14 days
falsification_conditions.what_it_would_mean: A clear breakout above this level would invalidate the 'HOLD' signal by confirming a bullish trend contrary to the pattern's historical behavior

falsification_conditions.condition: The 14-day moving average of the CBOE VIX crosses below 20 (indicating extreme market complacency)
falsification_conditions.what_it_would_mean: Such a drop in volatility would contradict the 'blowoff score' of 41, which implies high volatility, thereby falsifying the current unknown phase assessment

falsification_conditions.condition: The Federal Reserve announces a 50-basis-point rate cut in the next 14 days
falsification_conditions.what_it_would_mean: This policy shift would directly counteract the pattern's implied bearish bias, invalidating the 'HOLD' verdict by introducing a major catalyst for a market reversal

doctrine: If you can't list what would prove your call wrong, you don't have a real call.
